name: @stoplight/spectral-ref-resolver
description: This package provides Spectral-compatible bindings for [@stoplight/json-ref-resolver](https://github.com/stoplightio/json-ref-resolver) and [@stoplight/json-ref-readers](https://github.com/stoplightio/json-ref-readers).
